urdu transliteration text:
(Haaye asghar, haaye asghar) x3
O Asghar, O Asghar
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun) x2
english translation text: Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text: Raton ko jag kar me lori tumhe sunaun
english translation text: I will stay awake at night, and sing you a lullaby

urdu transliteration text: (Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun) x2
english translation text: Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Be teygh ran mei tu aur, qatil ka saamna tha
Dil tut ta hai mera, tu lot ke na aaya
english translation text:
You faced the enemies on the battlefield without a sword
My heart is breaking, you never returned back.

urdu transliteration text:
Koi nahi humara, ab kisko me bulaun
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun) x2
english translation text:
No one is here for us, whom should I call..
Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Jule ko dekh kar ab, beta me rorahi hun
Pyara sa tera chehra din raat dekhti hun
english translation text:
I cry when I see your empty cradle
I see your beautiful face day and night (on the spear)

urdu transliteration text:
Kya beet ti hai mujhpar kaise tujhe bataun
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun) x2
english translation text:
I can’t even tell you, what goes through my heart.
Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Darya ke paas bhi tu, sehroz ka tha pyaasa
Paani ke badle beta, ik teer tune khaaya
english translation text:
We were so close to the river, yet you were thirsty
Instead of water, they gave you an arrow

urdu transliteration text:
Paani ke saath ab mei, kaise nazar milaawu(n)
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun) x2
english translation text:
Now how do I even look at water (without thinking of your thirst)
Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Kya bezubaan bache, jaate hai suwe maqtal
Pathar dilo(n) se saara, haaye bhara hai karbal,
english translation text:
Do babies go fight on the battlefield?
The battlefield is filled with heartless enemies

urdu transliteration text:
Lot aawo mere bete, kaise tujhe manaawu(n)
(Maan kehti thi asghar mere ghar lot ke aanaa) Mother keeps asking you to come back home O Aliasghar
english translation text: Please come back to me my child, How else do I implore ?

urdu transliteration text:
Thi aag ki zami(n) aur, thi pyaas ki wo shiddat
Kis haal me huwi thi, beta teri shahadat,
Under such unfortunate conditions, you experienced your martydom
english translation text: The land was burning hot, the thirst unbearable

urdu transliteration text:
ye baat janti hu(n), saye me kaise jaun
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun) x2
english translation text:
How do I ever go under shade, (knowing you were under scorching heat?)
Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Puchegi jab sakina, bhayi mera kahaan hai,
Amma zara batao asghar to meri jaan hai
english translation text:
When your sister Sakina asks me “where is my brother”
“Tell me mother, Asghar is my beloved”

urdu transliteration text:
Bechayn hai sakina kaise usse manaun
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun) x2
english translation text:
Sakina is so restless, how do I console her?
Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Neze pe tera sar jab meri nazar me aya,
Thi me rasan mei leykin, ik baat ne sataaya
english translation text:
When I see your tiny head on the Spear
I am in chains, but it really hurts me..

urdu transliteration text:
Zalim ke pathharon se kaise tujhe bachaun
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun)
english translation text:
I cannot even save you from the stones thrown by the enemies
Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Tu teer khake soya, jalti zamin pe beta
Zindane shaam me phir, marjayegi sakina
english translation text:
You died on the hot sands, being shot by an arrow, my son
In the dark dungeons of Shaam, Sakina will also die

urdu transliteration text:
Yasrab ko laut kar me, sughra ko kya batawu(n)
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun) x2
english translation text:
What will I answer your sister Sughra, When I return back to Medina?
Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Bacho(n) ko khelte ab, kistarha se mei dekhu(n)
ye baat hai sataati, tumko kahaa(n) se laawu(n)
english translation text:
How will I bear to see children playing
It will definitely hurt me, I will not have you with me

urdu transliteration text:
Ankho(n) ke aansuo(n) se, gham ke diye jalaawu(n)
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun)
english translation text:
With my tears, I will put out this burning fire in my heart
Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Sunti hu teer tumne, halqoom pe hai khaaya
Tera gala chida hai, Tu khun mei nahaaya,
english translation text:
I have heard, you were shot by an arrow on your neck
the Arrow split your throat, and you bathed in your own blood

urdu transliteration text:
Karbal ki khaak sar par, kaise na ab urhaawu(n)
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun)
english translation text:
How then would I not throw the sand of Kerbala on my head (to express my grief)
Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Jab ran se laash ayi, kya haal tha “Tejani”
Choti lahad banaake, banu ye roke boli
Digging her sons small grave, Asghars Mom said..
english translation text: When your body came to the tents, the condition was unbearable “Tejani”

urdu transliteration text:
Tan tera khun me tar, kistarha bhul jaaun
(Godi me aawo asghar, jula tera julaun) x2
english translation text:
“How can I ever forget, your body drenched in Blood”
Come to me Asghar, I will rock your cradle
